# Operation Binary Update 03

```sql
USE LIVE
GO

DROP TABLE #T1
SELECT OB.WORKORDER_TYPE
	, OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	, OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	, OB.SEQUENCE_NO
	, O.RESOURCE_ID
	, O.OPERATION_TYPE
	, O.[STATUS]
	, CAST(CAST(OB.BITS AS VARBINARY(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS [BEFORE_OB]
	, REPLACE(CAST(CAST(OB.BITS AS VARBINARY(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) 
		, 'INDICATE MASKANT USED:  PLUGS / TAPE / LIQUID'
		, 'MASKANT USED: PLUGS'
	) AS [AFTER_OB]
	, OB.BITS AS [OB_BINARY]
	, OB.BITS_LENGTH AS [OB_BITLEN]
INTO #T1
FROM OPERATION O
INNER JOIN OPERATION_BINARY OB
	ON O.WORKORDER_TYPE = OB.WORKORDER_TYPE
	AND O.WORKORDER_BASE_ID = OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_LOT_ID = OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID = OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	AND O.WORKORDER_SUB_ID = OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	AND O.SEQUENCE_NO = OB.SEQUENCE_NO
WHERE (O.WORKORDER_TYPE = 'M')
	AND RESOURCE_ID = 'P1F1-PEN-MASK'
	AND CAST(CAST(OB.BITS AS VARBINARY(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) LIKE '%INDICATE MASKANT USED:  PLUGS / TAPE / LIQUID%'
	AND OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID IN ('PDT123W1008-501', '187W8201-501', '187W8201-502', '187W8201-503', '187W8201-504', '187W8201-505', '187W8201-506', '187W8201-507', '187W8201-508', '187W8201-509', '187W8201-510', '187W8201-511', '187W8201-512', '187W8201-514', '187W8201-515', '187W8201-516', '187W8201-517', '187W8201-518', '187W8201-519', '187W8201-520')

SELECT * FROM #T1 
-- 19 RECORDS

--SELECT * FROM OPERATION_BINARY WHERE WORKORDER_BASE_ID = 'PDT123W1008-501' AND SEQUENCE_NO = '65'
--
--362

/*
BEGIN TRANSACTION;
UPDATE OB
SET OB.BITS = 
	, OB.BITS_LENGTH = 362
FROM OPERATION_BINARY OB
INNER JOIN #T1 T
	ON OB.WORKORDER_TYPE = T.WORKORDER_TYPE
	AND OB.WORKORDER_BASE_ID = T.WORKORDER_BASE_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_LOT_ID	= T.WORKORDER_LOT_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID = T.WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID
	AND OB.WORKORDER_SUB_ID = T.WORKORDER_SUB_ID
	AND OB.SEQUENCE_NO = T.SEQUENCE_NO
--> COMMIT TRANSACTION;
--> ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

*/
```
